creator: developers.openai.com

evidence.text: An agent improvement loop offers a path toward continual improvement without reducing the problem to prompt tuning alone. The full loop matters: traces capture behavior, human feedback adds judgment, evals preserve what the system should do, HALO turns the evidence into ranked harness changes, and Codex can implement the next pass.

title: Build an Agent Improvement Loop with Traces, Evals, and Codex
